name: Right Jump
author: Poki
description: Right Jump is a platform game all about perfect timing and quick reflexes!️ Run and jump, and make your way through tricky maps filled with elevators, trampolines, moving platforms, and more. Each level brings new challenges that test both your strategy and agility. Think you’ve got the skills to reach the end? How to play Right Jump Move left or right: A/D or the left/right arrow key Go down: S or the down arrow key Jump: the space bar, W or the up arrow key Who created Right Jump Right Jump is created by Invent4.com. Play their other games on Poki: Morph Balls ! How can I play Right Jump for free? You can play Right Jump for free on Poki. Can I play Right Jump on mobile devices and desktop? Right Jump can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
